invariants.invariant: Single user-facing entry remains yxj-paper-index / yxj Paper Orchestrator; departments are internal routing.
invariants.implementationEvidence: yxj-paper-index and orchestrator-contract preserve one Paper Orchestrator identity and internal routing; no public PUA skill fan-out is introduced.
invariants.reviewEvidence: pending final independent review after ledger_guard blocker fix

invariants.invariant: PUA is operational telemetry and failure escalation, not rhetoric.
invariants.implementationEvidence: validate_pua_telemetry enforces L0-L4 thresholds, L2+ pua_report, L3 checklist, L4 count, and strict int failure_count.
invariants.reviewEvidence: pending final independent review after ledger_guard blocker fix

invariants.invariant: L2+ pua_report exactly mirrors top-level telemetry.
invariants.implementationEvidence: validate_pua_telemetry compares report failure_count, failure_mode, attempts, excluded, next_hypothesis, and manager_action against top-level telemetry.
invariants.reviewEvidence: pending final independent review after ledger_guard blocker fix

invariants.invariant: PUA semantic failures are locked by invalid fixtures and mutation checks.
invariants.implementationEvidence: Invalid fixtures cover missing telemetry, L2 missing report, L2 mismatched report, L3 incomplete checklist, L4 inconsistent count, and bool failure_count mutation.
invariants.reviewEvidence: pending final independent review after ledger_guard blocker fix

invariants.invariant: PUA telemetry never replaces validator evidence or completion closure.
invariants.implementationEvidence: runtime/state contracts keep pua_telemetry as audit/control state only while validator_evidence remains mandatory.
invariants.reviewEvidence: pending final independent review after ledger_guard blocker fix

invariants.invariant: Team and paper-owner semantic gates remain explicit; paper-owner-gate is user_gate, not native subagent.
invariants.implementationEvidence: agent-contract markers keep paper-owner-gate as user_gate and Team gated after RALPLAN plus current-story approval.
invariants.reviewEvidence: pending final independent review after ledger_guard blocker fix

invariants.invariant: Exact completion invariant remains: compile -> execute -> collect -> validate -> ingest -> state_transition.
invariants.implementationEvidence: runtime/state contracts document the exact path; fixture validator and ledger_guard both require explicit valid state_transition for complete tasks.
invariants.reviewEvidence: pending final independent review after ledger_guard blocker fix

invariants.invariant: Complete task cannot pass with missing/wrong state_transition or wrong pipeline_stage in fixture or ledger_guard paths.
invariants.implementationEvidence: task_has_state_transition and task_has_complete_transition require pipeline_stage: state_transition, state_transition.from, state_transition.to: complete, and state_transition.at.
invariants.reviewEvidence: pending final independent review after ledger_guard blocker fix

invariants.invariant: ledger_guard stamp emits only compliant complete state transitions by default and rejects non-complete transition targets.
invariants.implementationEvidence: stamp writes pipeline_stage: state_transition, defaults --transition-to complete, and rejects --status complete with another transition target.
invariants.reviewEvidence: pending final independent review after ledger_guard blocker fix

invariants.invariant: Source plugin and active installed cache are synchronized for changed plugin areas.
invariants.implementationEvidence: source/cache docs, fixtures, skills, and .codex-plugin drift check passed after final ledger_guard fixes.
invariants.reviewEvidence: pending final independent review after ledger_guard blocker fix
